form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 5th over 1609m at this track was 3rd- at the bell, beaten 3.5 m by Bruno No No No (1:51.30) on December 27 at $4.80. Finds a nice race to launch the campaign.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second behind Poseidon Seelster at this track over 1609m in a OPEN on March 21 at $27.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.3 m finishing second behind Rochester Flash at this track over 1609m on March 28 at $7.40. Rates highly. Big chance.
